description: Create a content slide on the morality of AI with a left-side ethical dilemma diagram and a right sidebar of explanatory notes in a sidebar-right layout.

header.headline: The morality of AI is under scrutiny as decision making is transferred increasingly to machines – Complex dilemmas and conflicts remain
header.sub: The Moral Machine – Computing complex and paradox issues

main.title: Who should be spared? Example: An imminent car crash
main.body: Ethical trade-offs in AI-driven crash decisions are illustrated through a conceptual scenario. Key dilemmas shown include younger vs. older people and humans vs. animals, framed as part of a broader moral machine discussion.

items.text: The slide explores the morality of AI as decision making is transferred increasingly to machines.
The Moral Machine is presented as a way of computing complex and paradox issues.
Central question: who should be spared in an imminent car crash.
Example ethical dilemmas include younger vs. older people.
Example ethical dilemmas include humans vs. animals.
